headline: Bernstein Calls Colgate’s (CL) Geographic Footprint the ‘Most Productive,’ Initiates at Market Perform
summary: Colgate-Palmolive Company (NYSE:CL) is included among the 10 Best S&P 500 Dividend Stocks to Buy Right Now. Bernstein initiated coverage of Colgate-Palmolive Company (NYSE:CL) on June 12 with a Market Perform rating. It also set a $96 price target on the stock. Analyst Cristian Rios described Colgate as having the “most productive” geographic footprint among […]
